column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=1 AND title='Senior Backend Engineer')

column.name: description
column.value: Own core microservices, guide architecture decisions, and mentor teammates.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 6+ years building Java/Spring services; experience with cloud-native tooling.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=1 AND title='Product Designer')

column.name: description
column.value: Collaborate with cross-functional squads to design intuitive hiring flows.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 3+ years in product design; strong Figma skills; portfolio demonstrating UX thinking.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=2 AND title='Manufacturing Supervisor')

column.name: description
column.value: Lead shift operations for Globex's new assembly plant, ensuring safety and output KPIs.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 5+ years supervising manufacturing lines; lean six sigma is a plus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=2 AND title='Regional Sales Manager')

column.name: description
column.value: Drive enterprise sales across ASEAN, building long-term relationships with key accounts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 7+ years enterprise sales; proven track record hitting quotas; willingness to travel.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Employee stock refreshers, 15 days PTO, remote stipend, and annual conference budget.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Annual learning grant, flexible hours, design system summit travel, and wellness days.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Shift allowance, safety bonus, private healthcare, and leadership development track.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Quarterly commission accelerators, regional travel budget, and private healthcare coverage.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=3 AND title='Senior AI Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Own model training and deployment for finance automation copilots.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 6+ years with Python, transformers, vector databases, and MLOps pipelines.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Hybrid stipend, on-site chef lunches, annual AI research grant.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=3 AND title='Implementation Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Guide enterprise rollouts of Lumos workflows and ensure measurable adoption.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Background in consulting plus strong SQL and stakeholder facilitation skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Wellness budget, parking allowance, quarterly bonus tied to NPS.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=4 AND title='Fleet Operations Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Coordinate inbound and outbound container flows across regional depots.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 5+ years in logistics ops, strong command of WMS/TMS platforms, excellent leadership.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Performance bonus, private health insurance, language stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=4 AND title='Customs Compliance Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Monitor trade documentation, HS codes, and regulatory filings for APAC shipments.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Knowledge of INCOTERMS, data analysis basics, and meticulous documentation habits.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Annual learning grant, flexible Friday hours, wellness allowance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=5 AND title='Clinical Product Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Translate clinician needs into backlog for Zeniths patient management suite.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Experience shipping healthcare SaaS, strong analytical thinking, empathy for users.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Conference travel, premium healthcare, parental support program.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=5 AND title='Nursing Operations Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Optimize staffing models and telehealth triage quality across clinics.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Registered nurse background plus 3+ years leading multi-site operations.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Housing allowance, shift meals, annual retreat.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=6 AND title='Ecommerce Merchandiser' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Plan digital drops, analyze sell-through, and brief creative for BluePeak collections.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Data-driven mindset, proficiency in Google Analytics, passion for fashion trends.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Merchandise credits, flexible Friday schedule, wellness stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=6 AND title='Store Experience Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Coach boutique leaders and deploy experiential retail playbooks across the region.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 7+ years multi-store management, strength in people development and KPIs.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Travel allowance, quarterly bonus, leadership academy access.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=7 AND title='Grid Integration Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Design SCADA integrations and stability studies for new solar farms.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Electrical engineering degree, power systems modeling, PSS/E skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Site per diem, solar credits, safety bonus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=7 AND title='Sustainability Analyst' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Model impact metrics, support ESG reporting, and collaborate with investors.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Strong financial modeling, understanding of ESG frameworks, stakeholder comms.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Education stipend, volunteer days, wellness package.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=8 AND title='Venture Debt Associate' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Evaluate growth-stage borrowers, build models, and prepare credit memos.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 2+ years in banking or consulting, advanced Excel, storytelling skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Deal bonus, CFA sponsorship, private healthcare.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=8 AND title='Capital Markets Director' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Lead fundraising mandates, structure offerings, and mentor associates.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 8+ years structuring deals, strong LP relationships, polished communication.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Car allowance, profit sharing, global conference travel.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=9 AND title='Art Director' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Own concept development for experiential campaigns and brand refreshes.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Portfolio with digital and experiential work, confident client presentation skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Creative retreat, gear budget, flexible Fridays.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=9 AND title='Motion Designer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Deliver motion toolkits, social animations, and on-stage visuals.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Mastery of After Effects or Blender, attention to detail, collaboration mindset.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Home workstation grant, wellness stipend, education credits.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=10 AND title='Project Controls Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Stand up PMO standards, cost tracking, and risk logs for megaprojects.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Primavera or MS Project expert, cost engineering track record, leadership skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Site allowance, hazard bonus, housing support.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=10 AND title='BIM Coordinator' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Manage BIM workflows, clash detection, and subcontractor coordination.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Revit expertise, scripting familiarity, field communication strengths.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Professional certification budget, meal allowance, transport shuttle.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=11 AND title='Avionics Test Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Design and execute hardware-in-the-loop tests for UAV flight computers.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Electronics background, scripting knowledge, disciplined documentation.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Flight benefits, patent bonus, cafeteria plan.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=11 AND title='Supply Chain Planner' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Forecast component demand, manage suppliers, and maintain resilience plans.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Experience with ERP systems, negotiation skills, attention to quality.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Transport shuttle, KPI bonus, premium insurance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=12 AND title='IoT Field Specialist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Deploy and calibrate sensor kits on partner farms across the Mekong region.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Comfort with travel, hardware troubleshooting, and farmer enablement.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Per diem, equipment allowance, agritech training.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=12 AND title='Data Agronomist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Convert sensor readings into actionable crop insights and advisory content.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Agronomy or data science background, SQL, storytelling ability.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Research grants, wellness stipend, flexible Fridays.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=13 AND title='Threat Detection Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Build detections, run purple team exercises, and tune SIEM content.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Experience with MITRE ATT&CK, scripting, and public cloud telemetry.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Home lab stipend, conference budget, on-call bonus.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=13 AND title='Security Account Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Own executive relationships, roadmap sessions, and renewal health.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Background in cybersecurity services, communication excellence, empathy.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Commission plan, wellness perks, certification budget.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=14 AND title='City Launcher' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Lead e-scooter deployments, hire local teams, and hit ridership targets.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Growth ops mindset, playbook execution, willingness to travel frequently.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Mobility credits, quarterly bonus, gear stipend.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=14 AND title='Embedded Systems Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Improve battery management and telemetry firmware for MetroRide fleets.

column.name: requirements
column.value: C/C++, CAN bus familiarity, lab debugging skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: R&D allowance, stock options, wellness package.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=15 AND title='Curriculum Designer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Build project-based learning modules for data and robotics cohorts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Instructional design experience, STEM expertise, creative storytelling.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Teacher wellness fund, book budget, hybrid schedule.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=15 AND title='Career Success Coach' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Coach learners on interview prep, resume upgrades, and employer outreach.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Career coaching background, communication excellence, empathy.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Learning credits, mental health support, remote allowance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=16 AND title='Hotel Revenue Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Optimize pricing strategies across boutique properties using demand signals.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Experience with RMS tools, analytical mindset, stakeholder influence.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Hotel stay credits, bonus plan, travel allowance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=16 AND title='Guest Experience Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Design signature guest rituals, train front office teams, and monitor feedback data.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Luxury hospitality background, coaching skills, data literacy.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Uniform allowance, wellness program, leadership academy.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=17 AND title='Podcast Producer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Shepherd weekly shows from pitch to publish with creative hosts.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Audio editing mastery, storytelling instincts, calm under deadline.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Studio upgrade stipend, content bonus, flexible Fridays.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=17 AND title='Growth Marketing Strategist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Stand up lifecycle experiments to increase subscriptions and engagement.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Lifecycle automation tools, copywriting skills, analytical rigor.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Performance bonus, wellness stipend, remote office grant.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=18 AND title='Data Platform Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Build ingestion pipelines, governance, and observability for analytics stacks.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Expertise with Spark or Flink, cloud data warehouses, automation mindset.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Certification budget, remote allowance, profit sharing.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=18 AND title='Analytics Consultant' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Embed with enterprise clients to design dashboards and data literacy programs.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Excellent SQL, stakeholder facilitation, polished communication.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Billable bonus, wellness stipend, travel allowance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=19 AND title='Process Engineer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Optimize treatment plant throughput, quality, and maintenance routines.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Chemical or mechanical engineering background, lean mindset, field presence.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Housing shuttle, KPI bonus, professional dues.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=19 AND title='Smart Meter Product Owner' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Lead roadmap for IoT meters and customer analytics portal.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Product ownership experience, IoT familiarity, agile leadership.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Stock options, home internet stipend, innovation lab budget.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=20 AND title='Technical Apparel Designer' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Prototype performance gear, test new textiles, and collaborate with suppliers.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 3D pattern tools, material science basics, athleticwear passion.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Merchandise credits, flexible hours, annual retreat.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=20 AND title='Digital Commerce Lead' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Scale D2C channels, optimize CRM journeys, and lead growth squads.

column.name: requirements
column.value: 7+ years in ecommerce, marketing automation mastery, leadership skills.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Profit sharing, wellness stipend, remote work kit.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=21 AND title='Risk Modeling Specialist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Develop climate-aware actuarial models and tools for commercial lines.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Actuarial background, Python or R, ability to present to executives.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Exam support, bonus plan, wellness coverage.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=21 AND title='Partnerships Manager' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Grow broker and bank partnerships across Vietnam and monitor pipeline health.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Relationship management expertise, sales discipline, travel readiness.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Car allowance, incentive plan, learning credits.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=22 AND title='Cell Therapy Scientist' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Design and run lab experiments supporting Radiants next-gen therapies.

column.name: requirements
column.value: PhD or MSc in biology, GMP familiarity, meticulous documentation.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Lab allowance, publication bonus, premium insurance.

column.name: job_position_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM job_positions WHERE company_id=22 AND title='Clinical Trial Coordinator' LIMIT 1)

column.name: description
column.value: Manage study sites, documentation, and patient logistics for clinical trials.

column.name: requirements
column.value: Clinical research experience, regulatory literacy, organized communication.

column.name: benefits
column.value: Meal stipend, transport allowance, annual retreat.
